mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job (company_id, title, city, experience, education, min_salary, max_salary, salary_unit, skills, job_desc, publish_time, created_at) VALUES (#{companyId}, #{title}, #{city}, #{experience}, #{education}, #{minSalary}, #{maxSalary}, #{salaryUnit}, #{skills}, #{jobDesc}, #{publishTime}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT city AS name, COUNT(*) AS count, AVG((min_salary + max_salary) / 2) AS avgSalary FROM job GROUP BY city ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT c.name AS name, COUNT(*) AS count, AVG((j.min_salary + j.max_salary) / 2) AS avgSalary FROM job j LEFT JOIN company c ON j.company_id = c.id GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT skill AS name, COUNT(*) AS count, AVG(salary) AS avgSalary FROM ( SELECT TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(j.skills, ',', numbers.n), ',', -1)) AS skill, (j.min_salary + j.max_salary) / 2 AS salary FROM job j JOIN ( SELECT 1 n UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 ) numbers ON CHAR_LENGTH(j.skills) - CHAR_LENGTH(REPLACE(j.skills, ',', '')) >= numbers.n - 1 ) t WHERE skill != '' GROUP BY skill ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT * FROM job ORDER BY publish_time DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
